name: Lake Lucerne Paddle Steamer Cruise
description: Cruise on a historic paddle steamer through the stunning mountain-framed Lake Lucerne.
longDescription: Step aboard one of five beautifully restored vintage paddle steamers on Lake Lucerne for a journey through some of Switzerland's most dramatic scenery. Pass the Rütli meadow — birthplace of the Swiss Confederation — and spots associated with the William Tell legend.

providers.name: SGV (Lake Lucerne Navigation)
providers.description: Round trip on historic paddle steamer

providers.name: SGV (Sunset Cruise)
providers.description: Evening cruise with dinner and live music

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's biggest activities marketplace — verified suppliers, free cancellation
